title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. albidobractea
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. albidobractea, commonly known as White-stemmed Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin irritations and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. albidobractea include its potential to reduce pain, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
